commit.message:
LU-16565 ldlm: 9: Remove ldlm is,set,clear macros

This patch removes some of the ldlm_is,set,clear_ macro
usage and replaces it with direct flag names.

This is patch 9 in a series.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I53c9b3ba918fc5990a850abc8c6116e5105f7e86
